channel.title: Philosophy on John Westbroek
channel.description: Recent content in Philosophy on John Westbroek

item.title: Dokkōdō
item.description: Miyamoto Musashi is a legendary swordsman, undefeated in 63 one-one-one duels. He killed his first man when he was 13. He fought in numerous wars, then transitioned into being a wandering swordsman, pursuing mastery over his chosen path. Later in his life he put down the sword, and pursued mastery in calligraphy, painting, philosophy, metallurgy, and more. Miyamoto Musashi’s 21 principles of Dokkodo The Dokkodo (“The Path of Aloneness,” The Way to Go Forth Alone,” or “The Way of Walking Alone”) is a short work written by Miyamoto Musashi shortly before his death.
